# Dr. Kaushal Pokhrel - Refractive Surgery Specialist

> Expert Refractive and Cataract Surgeon based in Kathmandu, Nepal, specializing in SMILE PRO, LASIK, ICL, and advanced lens replacement.

## Core Expertise
- **SMILE PRO**: Next-generation flapless laser vision correction using the VISUMAX 800.
- **Femto-LASIK**: Precision flap-based laser surgery for myopia, hyperopia, and astigmatism.
- **ICL/IPCL**: Phakic intraocular lens implantation for high prescriptions and thin corneas.
- **Advanced Cataract/CLE**: Premium IOL (Trifocal/EDOF) surgery for lifetime clarity.
- **Presbyond**: Laser blended vision for age-related reading vision loss (Presbyopia).

## Clinical Trust Signals
- **Affiliation**: Consultant at Tilganga Institute of Ophthalmology, Kathmandu.
- **Research**: Published in international journals; member of ISMSICS (Nepal Chapter).
- **Technology**: Expert user of ZEISS VISUMAX 800, MEL 90, and premium IOL platforms.

## Humanitarian Work
- Active in Visual Freedom Foundation (VFF).
- Nepal Ophthalmic Society and Lions Club member.
- Extensive rural surgical outreach across Nepal.

## Surgery Details
- **SMILE PRO**: 10-second laser time, flapless, fast recovery.
- **LASIK**: Proven precision, dual-laser technology.
- **ICL**: Reversible, high-definition vision, no tissue removal.
- **PRK**: Surface-based, ideal for specific corneal profiles.
- **Presbyond**: Eliminates reading glasses, natural transition.

## Contact & Consultation
- **Location**: Kathmandu, Nepal.
- **Booking**: Available via the website's eligibility checker and contact form.
- **Languages**: English, Nepali.
